calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2023 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tsang, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2022 Continued To Jan-10-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to January 10, 2023 at 10:30am in Department 610. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-16-2022 Continued To Oct-11-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
